# odm-maps / bond_ave / 2026-02-16

Path on NAS: `\\raconteur\datasets\odm-maps\bond_ave-2026-02-16`

* [[imagesets-bond_ave-2026-02-16-grid]]
* [[imagesets-bond_ave-2026-02-16-orbit]]

![[fables/Datasets/odm-maps-bond_ave-2026-02-16/map_preview.png]]

*Preview generated by [[odm-maps-data-collection]].*

## Qualitative
Looks pretty good on the house, not usable but not fully discouraging.
* Areas completely missing in point cloud
* model gaps under eaves all around
* textured model has trees projected, all sides of the house
* Slight waviness in the gutters but not atrocious
* Garage door dissolves into mush in textured model
Ground in driveway by garage looks pretty soft, maybe focus in originals?
DEM has great detail for downed logs and things. But I think we need a better classifier to help clean things up.
## Processing Notes
- Ran on [[Lancer]], launched from ~/WebODM in WSL
- WSL had 32G limit including some Cursor overhead as well as the jobs
- Job ran to completion but the UI lost track of it; I copied the data directory out using Docker Desktop. I was able to hit Import in the UI and upload the all.zip and view the map and 3d model in WebODM.
